use_cases: Hero section backgrounds with interactive circular mask reveal following cursor movement
Landing page visual effects where content is revealed as users hover and move their mouse
Creative portfolio showcases with dynamic mask animations
Interactive gallery overlays with mouse-tracking reveal effects
Text and image reveal animations on landing pages
ai_summary: An interactive SVG mask effect component that tracks mouse position to reveal content through a circular mask. Features smooth animations powered by Framer Motion, hover state management with dynamic mask sizing, and automatic light/dark mode support. The circular SVG mask follows the cursor, creating a spotlight reveal effect that expands on hover. Ideal for hero sections and landing pages where engaging visual effects can capture user attention.
